commit.subject: ATM-265 - We need to test with both a combined mgs/mdt and separate servers.
commit.message:
ATM-265 - We need to test with both a combined mgs/mdt and separate
servers.

Patch to test stand alone MGS Autotest changes

Test-Parameters: fortestonly standalonemgs clientcount=2 osscount=1 \
mdscount=1 testgroup=review-ldiskfs clientdistro=el7 serverdistro=el7

Test-Parameters: fortestonly standalonemgs clientcount=2 osscount=1 \
mdscount=1 testgroup=review-ldiskfs clientdistro=ubuntu1604 serverdistro=el7

Change-Id: I67bb4bc4f1061bb44002abc1cfdf13d87c42f24f
Signed-off-by: colmstea <charlie.olmstead@intel.com>
